case_title: CRANE FERRIS VS DERITIS CAROL ENGE OWNER WHOLESOME CLASSICS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY CRANE FERRIS AS TO DEFENDANT DERITIS CAROL ENGE OWNER WHOLESOME CLASSICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRANE FERRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DERITIS CAROL ENGE OWNER WHOLESOME CLASSICS $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
